supporting_lessons.summary: R0001 produced 0 profitable and 9 losing fold-isolated MT5 tick folds, total tick net PnL -402.14, and worst fold rw_009 net PnL -66.26.
Schedule replay mechanical parity passed with mismatch_count 0, so the weak result is not explained by proxy-vs-MT5 logic mismatch.
Tick execution improved closed-bar logic by 81.96 total net PnL across 9 better and 0 worse folds, but both logic and tick surfaces remained negative.
Native MQL signal logic, ONNX materialization, cost/slippage hardening, final sizing, and historical lineage debt remain unresolved; no stronger claim is created.

required_kpi_summary.remaining_work_classification: no_candidate; further C0050 work would be adjacent threshold, stop, target, hold, session, activity, spread, capital, or volatility-transfer feature nudge tuning

hypothesis_variant.variant_boundary: R0001 opens a new C0050 surface focused on prior-session and current-session volatility transfer states, directional range transfer, opening impulse, and volatility-normalized location. It is not C0049 execution-path resilience, C0048 range-energy absorption, C0047 liquidity-void reversion, C0046 flow-convexity release, C0045 regression-channel residual hardening, C0012 session auction rotation, C0014 interday range handoff, C0024 calendar rhythm, threshold, window, stop, target, hold, session, activity, spread, capital, materialization, ONNX, or retry-only work.

notes: MT5 validation remains mandatory even if proxy KPI is weak.
Schedule replay is used only for paired validation and does not create runtime, materialization, ONNX, promotion, or live authority.

pre_open_decision.adjacent_tuning_rejection_reason: The run changes the major discovery question from path resilience, range-energy absorption, liquidity voids, flow convexity, regression residuals, session auction, interday handoff, or calendar rhythm to volatility-transfer state. It does not adjust score thresholds, windows, stops, targets, hold times, sessions, activity filters, spread assumptions, capital sizing, materialization, ONNX, or retry a prior failed run.
pre_open_decision.true_variant_summary: Tests whether closed M5 volatility-transfer state can identify fixed-lot entries whose directional target-first quality survives MT5 logic, tick execution, divergence, and fold-isolated validation.

notes: Proxy output is reference evidence and cannot stop MT5 validation.
